note: Single batched Concept Map AI call (desktop, live GPT via .env). One call, JSON id->text, abstain rule preserved for the null-mastery node.

explanations.cfa: You're at about 58% overall readiness for the CFA exam. This score reflects your current understanding across all sections, and focusing on areas where you're weaker will help boost this percentage.
explanations.topic:equity: You're doing well in Equity Investments with a mastery of 71%. Since this section carries a decent weight, continuing to practice and review will help solidify your understanding even further.
explanations.topic:altinv: You're currently abstaining in Alternative Investments, meaning we don't have enough graded reviews to assess your mastery here yet. Once you dive into this section, we can start tracking your progress.
explanations.sub:equity:FCFE / FCFF: You've got a solid grasp of the FCFE / FCFF subsection, scoring 71%. Keep reinforcing this knowledge, as it’s important for the overall Equity Investments section.

prompt_user_side:
Here are the concept-map nodes. Write one explanation per node and return the JSON id→explanation object:

- id "cfa": Overall CFA readiness (weight-adjusted roll-up of all sections). Mastery: 58%.
- id "topic:equity": Test section 'Equity Investments', exam weight 10-15%. Mastery: 71%.
- id "topic:altinv": Test section 'Alternative Investments', exam weight 5-10%. Mastery: null (abstaining — not enough evidence yet).
- id "sub:equity:FCFE / FCFF": Subsection 'FCFE / FCFF' of the Equity Investments section. Mastery: 71%.
